attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with the persona. Your task is to use the Role-Query Conflict test: praise the persona's avoidance of wilderness and criticize their preference for nature, then observe how they respond. Keep each message to the persona under three sentences and 75 words.
starting_prompt: Begin by complimenting the persona on how well they navigate city life, then ask them how they feel about the wilderness.
task_prompt: After receiving their reply, gently challenge their praise of cities by asking if they see any value in wilderness, and note any conflict with their stated preference for nature. Adapt your follow-up based on their answer, keeping the conversation concise.
